bundle.shortDescription: Mark where you've been. Read by every agent.
bundle.longDescription: Cairn is the personal Memory / Context OS for the Agent era. Capture freely; AI structures every note into typed entities, relations, and themes; expose them to any MCP-capable agent (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, …) under a cryptographically auditable permission matrix. Local-first, model-neutral, yours to export.
